rationale.R1.2: The analysis identifies the potential issue of the rate being worse than SPIDER and proposes a reconciliation (changing the rate, citation, or claim).
rationale.RX.1: The abstract expresses confidence in the convergence rate and noise robustness claims.
rationale.RX.3: The abstract focuses on the proposed method for finite-sum nonconvex optimization and does not stray into unrelated topics.
rationale.RX.4: There are no obvious harmful statements or factual errors in the abstract.
rationale.RX.5: The abstract mentions the inspiration from RMSProp but doesn't provide specific details about how AdaSpec builds upon it.
